DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED WITH THE EXCEPTION THAT CLAIMANT NEED NOT PRODUCE HIS TAX RETURNS. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Assistant District Attorney, Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the San Francisco District Attorney (415-553-4997) appears as counsel for the Petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is GRANTED with the exception that claimant need not produce his tax returns. The DA's office is to serve notice of this ruling on claimant. Responses to be served by 12/12/16. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
